Uses the topmodel artifact in ClimaArtifact instead of downloading from box
removes preprocessing script to create article, this lives in ClimaArtifacts now

title: topmodel artifact

body:
## Purpose 
Kevin recently added the 2008 year of ERA5 forcing to ClimaArtifacts. This updates our runs to use that instead of 2021

## To-do

## Content
Change artifacts toml and .jl file
Change scripts
